scripts.predev: npm run prepare:tinygo-compiler && npm run prepare:assets
scripts.prebuild: npm run prepare:tinygo-compiler && npm run prepare:assets
scripts.test:host: node --test tests/bootstrap-exports.test.ts tests/build-go-probe.test.mjs tests/build-tinygo-compiler.test.mjs tests/build-tinygo-upstream-probe.test.mjs tests/build-tinygo-upstream-frontend-probe.test.mjs tests/compile-unit.test.ts tests/emception-files.test.mjs tests/fetch-emception-worker.test.mjs tests/fetch-tinygo-source.test.mjs tests/fetch-tinygo-toolchain.test.mjs tests/lowered-exports.test.ts tests/patch-emception-worker.test.mjs tests/tinygo-driver-bridge-script.test.mjs tests/tinygo-host.test.mjs
scripts.test:tinygo-host: npm run prepare:tinygo && node ./scripts/probe-tinygo-driver-bridge.mjs && node --test tests/tinygo-driver-bridge.test.ts
